result.stdout:
Description:
  ssh-easy-config - Cross-platform SSH key management, sharing, and diagnostics

Usage:
  SshEasyConfig [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  setup            Generate SSH keys and configure SSH
  share            Share keys with another machine
  receive          Listen for incoming key share
  diagnose <host>  Diagnose SSH connectivity
  config <action>  Manage ssh_config / sshd_config

commands.payload:

  ssh-easy-config - Cross-platform SSH key management, sharing, and diagnostics

Usage:
  SshEasyConfig [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  setup            Generate SSH keys and configure SSH
  share            Share keys with another machine
  receive          Listen for incoming key share
  diagnose <host>  Diagnose SSH connectivity
  config <action>  Manage ssh_config / sshd_config

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage ssh_config / sshd_config

Usage:
  SshEasyConfig config [<action>] [options]

Arguments:
  <action>  Action: audit, harden, hosts

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Diagnose SSH connectivity

Usage:
  SshEasyConfig diagnose [<host>] [options]

Arguments:
  <host>  The host to diagnose

Options:
  --json          Output results as JSON
  --verbose       Show all checks including skipped
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Diagnose SSH connectivity

Usage:
  SshEasyConfig diagnose [<host>] [options]

Arguments:
  <host>  The host to diagnose

Options:
  --json          Output results as JSON
  --verbose       Show all checks including skipped
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Listen for incoming key share

Usage:
  SshEasyConfig receive [options]

Options:
  --mode <mode>    Transfer mode: network, clipboard, file [default: network]
  --input <input>  Input file path (for file mode)
  --host <host>    Hostname/IP to connect to (e.g. mypc.tail12345.ts.net)
  --code <code>    Pairing code (skip prompt)
  --port <port>    Port to connect to (skip mDNS discovery)
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Listen for incoming key share

Usage:

Options:

  --input <input>  Input file path (for file mode)
  --host <host>    Hostname/IP to connect to (e.g. mypc.tail12345.ts.net)
  --code <code>    Pairing code (skip prompt)
  --port <port>    Port to connect to (skip mDNS discovery)
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate SSH keys and configure SSH

Usage:
  SshEasyConfig setup [options]

Options:
  --verbose        Show diagnostic details during setup
  -y, --yes        Auto-confirm all prompts
  --approve-admin  Launch as Administrator without prompting (UAC still required)
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Options:

  --approve-admin  Launch as Administrator without prompting (UAC still required)
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Share keys with another machine

Usage:
  SshEasyConfig share [options]

Options:
  --mode <mode>      Transfer mode: network, clipboard, file [default: network]
  --output <output>  Output file path (for file mode)
  --host <host>      Hostname/IP to advertise (e.g. mypc.tail12345.ts.net)
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
